results.title: Senior Analytics Engineer at IDEXX Laboratories | Jeremy
highlights:
Senior Analytics Engineer at IDEXX Laboratories | Jeremy
...
# Senior Analytics Engineer
...
Build and own the semantic data layer in Snowflake for IDEXX's point-of-care diagnostics platform, enabling reliable analytics, reporting, and AI-driven insights across the diagnostic portfolio.
...
Python Git Snowflake Airflow SQL AI LLM ETL Data Modeling Version Control Data Quality dbt
...
We are seeking a Senior Analytics Engineer to build the trusted data foundation behind Point-of-Care analytics, reporting, and emerging AI-enabled insight generation. You'll own the transformation and semantic layer that sits between raw data infrastructure and the analysts, applications, and AI tools that consume it.
...
Point‑of‑care diagnostics generate some of the most valuable data in IDEXX, but that data is only as powerful as the models, definitions, and structure behind it. Today, analysts, applications, and emerging AI tools all depend on a trusted, well‑modeled layer to deliver accurate insights. This role builds that foundation. Your work determines how reliably our teams can analyze instrument performance, understand customer experience, and generate AI‑enabled insights across IDEXX’s diagnostic portfolio. When the modeled layer is clean, tested, documented, and consistent, everything built on top of it becomes faster, more accurate, and more scalable.
...
You'll design and maintain modeled datasets in Snowflake that support product analytics, customer experience insights, and operational reporting across IDEXX's diagnostic instrument portfolio.
...
Own the transformation layer in Snowflake, building and maintaining modeled datasets (silver/gold tier) from raw and bronze-tier sources. Design for clarity, performance, and reuse.
...
Build and maintain a semantic layer that makes our data discoverable and consumable by analysts, AI agents, and data catalog platforms. Embed business definitions, metric logic, and relationship metadata into the models and their documentation.
...
Define, document, and help drive adoption of
...
standards, testing practices, and documentation norms across the team
...
Establish patterns that analysts
...
engineers can follow consistently.
...
Help design and deploy AI-enabled workflows and agent applications against it, including automated data quality monitoring and tools that reduce repetitive analysis and recurring reporting effort across the team.
...
Genuine curiosity about AI and LLM tooling applied to data. You don't need to be an ML engineer, but you should be thinking about how structured data and metadata enable intelligent systems.
...
Ability to be excited about AI not because of the hype, but because you can see how clean, well-structured data makes it actually work.
...
Experience with Airflow or similar orchestration tools.
...
Experience with warehouse-native AI features such as such as semantic models, agent frameworks, or natural language query interfaces.
...
Experience building or maintaining semantic layers that serve BI tools, APIs, or agent-based systems.
...
### AI Data Engineer

IDEXX is a global leader in pet healthcare innovation. It provides a wide range of diagnostic and software products and services aimed at creating clarity and improving pet healthcare. IDEXX offers services such as reference laboratories, in-house analyzers, SNAP tests, and veterinary software to support veterinarians in diagnosing and treating small animals, livestock, and equines. They also specialize in water testing solutions, which help ensure the safety and quality of various water types. IDEXX is known for its contributions to the veterinary field, enabling professionals to make informed decisions through cutting-edge technology and advanced insights.

highlights:

## IDEX Corporation
...
IDEX Corporation is a global company renowned for producing mission-critical components that impact daily life. Their product portfolio includes precision components used in DNA sequencing, firefighting tools like the Hurst Jaws of Life, and fluid and metering technologies essential in various industrial sectors. Additionally, IDEX operates in the health and science sectors, where they develop liquid subassemblies and precision equipment for handling and analysis. Their diverse product lineup extends to firefighting and safety equipment, fluid handling technologies, and high-end solutions that facilitate medical research and safety operations.

SDET role focused on building test automation frameworks for a cloud-native, serverless payment processing platform on AWS, with emphasis on Lambda, DynamoDB, and API testing.
...
## Tech Stack
...
IDEXX is looking for a skilled Software Development Engineer in Test (SDET) who is passionate about automated testing in a cloud-native, serverless environment to join our team focused on the payments industry. You will be responsible for ensuring the reliability, scalability, and security of our AWS serverless-based payment processing platform. As an SDET, you will design and implement test automation frameworks, validate AWS Lambda functions, API integrations, and DynamoDB operations, and contribute to a robust CI/CD pipeline.
...
### In this role
...
Test Automation & Framework Development
...
Design, develop, and maintain automated test frameworks for serverless architectures.
...
Implement API test automation for payment processing services.
...
Automate functional, integration, security, and performance tests across AWS services (Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, S3, SNS, SQS).
...
AWS & Serverless Testing
...
Develop event-driven test strategies for AWS Lambda-based applications.
...
Write test cases to validate DynamoDB transactions, ensuring data consistency and scalability.
...
Test serverless workflows involving Step Functions, EventBridge, and SQS/SNS messaging.
...
Implement monitoring and validation checks using CloudWatch Logs, X-Ray, and AWS Config.
...
CI/CD & Infrastructure as Code (IaC) Testing
...
Integrate automated tests into CI/CD pipelines (Octopus Deploy).
...
Work with developers to enable test automation in Infrastructure as Code (IaC) deployments (Terraform, CloudFormation).
...
Ensure secure payment transactions by testing against PCI DSS compliance standards.
...
Performance & Security Testing
...
Conduct load and stress testing on payment APIs using k6 (preferred), JMeter or Gatling.
...
Implement security testing to detect vulnerabilities in API endpoints and AWS resources.
...
Work with DevOps and security teams to enforce least privilege access control and security best practices in AWS IAM roles.
...
Design and engineer tools for creating simulated game-day outage events for reliability testing.
...
### What you need to succeed
...
Bachelor’s/Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
...
5+ years of experience as an SDET, Test Automation Engineer, or QA Engineer in a cloud-based environment.
...
Strong programming skills in TypeScript (preferred), Python, or Java for test automation.
...
Hands-on experience with AWS services, particularly Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, S3, SNS, SQS, Step Functions.
...
Experience in testing RESTful APIs and event-driven architectures.
...
Familiarity with serverless development frameworks (AWS SAM, Serverless Framework, or CDK).
...
Expertise in CI/CD pipelines, GitHub Actions, AWS CodePipeline, or similar.
...
### Preferred Qualifications
...
Experience in testing APIs and WebSockets in payment processing.
...
Knowledge of AWS KMS for encryption and secure data handling.
...
Familiarity with contract testing (e.g., Pact for API compatibility).
...
Experience in synthetic monitoring and observability tools like Datadog, New Relic, AWS X-Ray.
...
Experience with testing tools like Playwright.
...
Understanding of payment industry standards (PCI DSS, EMV, tokenization, fraud prevention).

results.title: AI Engineer-Memory Retrieval | CareerSync
highlights:
AI Engineer-Memory Retrieval | CareerSync
...
# AI Engineer-Memory Retrieval
...
About the Role & TeamIDC is building the next generation of AI-powered intelligence platforms that transform how technology decisions get made. Our platform re-imagines the way decision-makers discover and interact with trusted research and data, and is foundational to IDC's future. We are looking for an AI/Agent Engineer to join the Memory / Living Intel Pod, with an emphasis on cross-conversational retrieval and semantic search over conversation history. This is a stretch and acceleration hire. You will build the retrieval systems that find relevant prior conversations and extracted facts, design embedding and indexing strategies for conversation-derived content, and optimize relevance ranking for memory retrieval.Your work ensures that when the platform remembers a user, it remembers the right things at the right time. The quality of memory retrieval directly determines how personalized and useful every AI-generated response feels
...
- Build specialized agents within multi-agent pipelines designed for handling complex research problems, developing durable outputs, and taking action in external systems on the user's behalf
- Build retrieval systems that find relevant prior conversations and extracted facts across a user's history
- Design embedding and indexing strategies for conversation-derived content
- Build and optimize relevance ranking for memory retrieval
- Build LLM-based memory capabilities: conversation summarization, cross-session context retrieval, and persistent user preference extraction
- Instrument pipelines for observability, tracing, and quality monitoring
- Collaborate with evaluation engineers on quality measurement and improvement

- What You Bring
...
- 3+ years of experience building production Python systems
- Experience with LLM applications: agent orchestration, prompt engineering, RAG, or similar
- Hands-on experience with agent frameworks (LangGraph, LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, or similar)
- Understanding of LLM reasoning patterns and common failure modes
- Proficiency with modern Python web frameworks
- Comfort working in a fast-moving team where priorities evolve

- Preferred Qualifications:
- Experience building semantic search and embedding pipelines
- Hands-on experience with vector databases (e.g., Snowflake Cortex, Pinecone, Weaviate)
- Background in information retrieval
- Experience with search relevance tuning and ranking optimization
- Familiarity with LLM observability tools
- Background in NLP, text summarization, or information extraction

results.title: VP, Artificial Intelligence - Products & Services | CareerSync
highlights:
Artificial Intelligence -
...
# VP, Artificial Intelligence - Products & Services
...
About the Role & TeamIDC is seeking a transformative AI leader to define and execute our enterprise-wide AI strategy—embedding cutting-edge artificial intelligence across both internal operations and customer-facing products. This is a rare opportunity to shape how a global data and intelligence company harnesses AI, from agentic workflows and large language models to predictive analytics and AI-native product experiences. Reporting directly to the CTO, the VP of AI will lead a high-performing technical team, partner across business units, and drive measurable business impact through intelligent, responsible, and scalable AI solutions. The ideal candidate combines deep technical expertise in modern AI—including generative AI, LLMs, and agentic systems—with the strategic acumen to align AI investments to revenue growth and competitive differentiation. IDC sits at the intersection of proprietary data, expert human insight, and global technology reach—an ideal foundation for AI transformation. Key opportunity areas include: AI-augmented research & analyst productivity — deploying LLM-powered tools to accelerate data synthesis, report generation, and market forecasting. Intelligent data products — embedding predictive models and AI-driven insights directly into IDC's subscription and advisory offerings. Agentic content & marketing workflows — leveraging generative AI to personalize content, automate content pipelines, and optimize Foundry's MarTech capabilities. Enterprise AI infrastructure — building shared platforms, APIs, and MLOps practices that enable AI adoption at scale across all IDC business units. What You’ll Do
...
AI Strategy & Vision: Partner with the CEO, CTO, CIO, and business unit heads to define IDC's multi-year AI roadmap—spanning generative AI, agentic systems, predictive analytics, and AI-native product development. Technical Leadership: Architect and oversee IDC's AI platform and infrastructure, ensuring scalability, security, and alignment with enterprise data strategy. Product Delivery: Develop and execute IDC’s approach to agentic AI technology, thereby delivering the centerpiece of IDC Quanta, our cross-channel technology intelligence layer. Team Building: Recruit, develop, and retain a world-class AI team spanning ML engineers, data scientists, AI product managers, and MLOps specialists. Stakeholder Alignment: Translate complex AI capabilities into clear business value for executives and department heads; maintain transparent goals and resource planning. Ecosystem & Partnerships: Evaluate and manage AI technology partnerships, vendor relationships, and open-source contributions to accelerate IDC's AI capabilities. What You Bring
...
PhD. or Master's degree in Computer Science, AI/ML, Statistics, or a related quantitative field (or equivalent experience).
...
7+ years of experience in applied machine learning, AI engineering, or data science—with at least 3 years in senior technical leadership roles.
...
impact (revenue growth,
...
reduction, or product differentiation).
...
Deep expertise in modern AI/ML and agentic/generative systems design.
...
Hands-on fluency with generative AI technologies: LLM fine-tuning, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), prompt engineering, and agentic frameworks (e.g., LangChain, LlamaIndex, AutoGen).
...
Strong engineering foundation: Python, SQL, cloud ML platforms (AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI, or Azure ML), and modern MLOps practices (CI/CD, model monitoring, feature stores).
